subject: fix(mobile): address 4 mobile UX audit findings
body:
- LabelSuggestions: Added mobile media query (44px touch targets for
  suggest button, badges, and dismiss)
- DebugPill: Safe area insets on mobile (env(safe-area-inset-*))
- Modal: max-height uses min(80vh, calc(100dvh - 100px)) for short screens
- GraphCanvas: touch-action: manipulation to prevent double-tap zoom
  conflicting with Cytoscape panning

Tags: mobile, touch-targets, safe-area, css
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality-audit
Semver: patch
